title: Slovakian Pan-Fried Dumplings with Cheese
description: A hearty Slovakian dish featuring crispy pan-fried dumplings topped with melted cheese. Perfect for a comforting meal.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, eggs, milk, and sour cream. Mix until a smooth dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until it becomes elastic and smooth.
Divide the dough into 8-10 equal pieces and roll each piece into a ball.
Flatten each ball into a disk shape.
Heat a large non-stick skillet over medium-high heat.
Add a small amount of vegetable oil to the skillet and swirl to coat.
Add 4-5 dumplings to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side until golden brown.
Transfer the dumplings to a serving plate and top with grated cheese.
Place the skillet under the broiler and melt the cheese until bubbly.
Serve the dumplings hot with melted cheese on top.
